info.name: PMO Dashboard — Phase IA-3 MikroORM Smoke Test
info.description:
60 requests across 14 folders. Verifies IA-V10 (no 500 errors after backend restart) and IA-V12 (Physical/Financial page regression).

SETUP:
1. Import this collection
2. Collection Variables are pre-filled (base_url = http://localhost:3000)
3. Run 00-A Login first — {{token}} auto-populates
4. Execute folders in order 00 → CLEANUP

KNOWN ISSUES (pre-Phase IE):
⚠ 03-A2: Filter uses '?type=' NOT '?operation_type=' — DTO field is 'type'. Phase IE renames it to 'operation_type'.
⚠ 06-A → 06-D: {{tax_id}} is auto-set by 06-A test script. Run 06-A BEFORE 06-D.
⛔ 06-D / 06-E: BLOCKED (IE-0) — 500 'invalid input syntax for type uuid: Q1' until Phase IE-0 deployed (validateOperationEditable param swap fix).
⛔ 07-B / 07-C: BLOCKED (IE-0) — same 500 error until Phase IE-0 deployed (validateFinancialEditable param swap fix).
⛔ 08-E / 08-F: BLOCKED (IE-3) — 500 error until Phase IE-3 deployed (SELECT role FROM users — column does not exist).

variable.description: Taxonomy item UUID — auto-set by 06-A (first item id)

request.description: Login to get Bearer token. Token is auto-set to {{token}} collection variable.
List all fiscal years. ORM path: fyRepo.findAll(). Already verified live (Phase IA-A).
Create a new fiscal year. ORM path: fyRepo.create() + em.persistAndFlush().
Toggle fiscal year active state. SuperAdmin only.
Get taxonomy for HIGHER_EDUCATION pillar. ORM: taxonomyRepo.find(). VERIFY: snake_case keys (backward-compat map applied).
Guard test: invalid pillar should return empty array or 400, NOT 500.

item.name: 03-A2: List Operations with Filters ⚠ (DTO uses 'type', NOT 'operation_type')

exec: console.error('Likely cause: using operation_type= instead of type=. DTO field is named "type".');
console.error('After Phase IE is deployed, operation_type= will be the correct param.');

request.description:
⚠ CURRENT BACKEND: DTO field is named 'type' (NOT 'operation_type'). Sending 'operation_type=' causes 400 'property operation_type should not exist' because ValidationPipe has forbidNonWhitelisted: true.

CORRECT NOW: ?type=HIGHER_EDUCATION

AFTER Phase IE is deployed: ?operation_type=HIGHER_EDUCATION (DTO field will be renamed).

{
  "operation_type": "HIGHER_EDUCATION",

  "code": "HE-ST-2025",

  "end_date": "2025-12-31",
  "status": "ONGOING",

  "fiscal_year": 2025
}

request.description: Create test operation. ID is auto-set to {{op_id}}.
VERIFY: response uses snake_case keys (backward-compat map applied). ORM: orgInfoRepo.
Verify data from 04-B was persisted correctly.
Physical/Financial page entry point. 404 is acceptable (no operation created yet for this pillar+year). Use {{op_id}} from 03-B for subsequent tests.

exec: console.log('✅ tax_id auto-set:', json[0].id, '— 06-D will use this automatically.');
console.error('❌ Taxonomy returned empty array. Ensure op_id is set and operation has an operation_type that matches a seeded pillar.');

request.description:
Fetches taxonomy items for the operation's pillar type. The first item's 'id' is auto-saved to {{tax_id}} and used by 06-D.

RUN THIS BEFORE 06-D — 06-D depends on {{tax_id}} being set here.

If this returns [] check: (1) {{op_id}} is set (run 03-B first), (2) the operation has a valid operation_type matching a seeded pillar.

item.name: 06-B: Get Indicators by Pillar + Year + Quarter

exec: console.error('❌ PRE-REQUEST FAILURE: {{tax_id}} is not set. Run 06-A first to auto-populate it.');
throw new Error('tax_id not set — run 06-A before 06-D');
if (msg.includes('invalid input syntax for type uuid')) {
console.error('⛔ IE-0 BLOCKER: validateOperationEditable param swap bug. Deploy Phase IE-0 fix before retesting.');
pm.test('⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE-0 (param swap fix)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.not.equal(500));
if (msg.includes('must be a UUID')) { console.error('Cause: {{tax_id}} not set — run 06-A first.'); }

request.description:
EXECUTION ORDER: 06-A must run before this request.

{{tax_id}} is auto-populated by 06-A's test script (first taxonomy item id). The pre-request script will ABORT with an error if {{tax_id}} is not set.

⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE-0 deployed: validateOperationEditable() has a param swap bug — params array is [operationId, quarter] but SQL has qr.quarter=? first and WHERE uo.id=? second. PostgreSQL receives WHERE uo.id='Q1' → 'invalid input syntax for type uuid: Q1' → 500.

Fix (IE-0): swap to [quarter, operationId] in service line ~307.

Common failures:
• 500 'invalid input syntax for type uuid' → IE-0 not yet deployed
• 400 'must be a UUID' → {{tax_id}} not set; run 06-A first
• 400 'op_id invalid' → {{op_id}} not set; run 03-B first

exec: if (pm.response.code === 500 && JSON.stringify(json).includes('invalid input syntax for type uuid')) {
console.error('⛔ IE-0 BLOCKER: validateOperationEditable param swap. Deploy Phase IE-0 first.');
pm.test('⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE-0 (param swap fix)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.not.equal(500));

request.description:
⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE-0: same validateOperationEditable param swap as 06-D. Will 500 with 'invalid input syntax for type uuid' until fix is deployed.

Requires {{indicator_id}} set by 06-D. Run 06-D before this.

⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE-0: validateFinancialEditable() has the same param swap as validateOperationEditable. Params [operationId, quarter] are swapped vs SQL placeholder order (qr.quarter=? first, WHERE uo.id=? second). Fix: swap to [quarter, operationId] at service line ~249.

Creates financial record. ID auto-set to {{financial_id}}. After IE-0 fix: verify computed metrics: utilization_rate ≈ 84, disbursement_rate ≈ 92.86.

Should return the record created in 07-B.

item.name: 08 — Quarterly Reports (ORM IA-2b create + IA-3 workflow)

request.description: ORM path: em.create(QuarterlyReport). VERIFY: snake_case keys present (serializeQuarterlyReport applied). publication_status = DRAFT.

item.name: 08-B: Create Same QR Again → idempotent (must return same id)

request.description: Idempotency test: same fiscal_year + quarter must return the same existing QR id from 08-A, not create a duplicate.
Verify QR with submitter_name (LEFT JOIN users in ORM).

item.name: 08-E: Submit Quarterly Report ⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE

exec: console.warn('⛔ PHASE IE REQUIRED: This request will return 500 until Phase IE is deployed.');
console.warn('Root cause: submitQuarterlyReport() runs SELECT role FROM users WHERE id=$1 — column "role" does not exist.');
console.warn('Fix: replace that raw SQL with this.permissionResolver.isAdminFromDatabase(userId). See Phase IE plan.');
console.error('❌ 500 error (expected until Phase IE):', JSON.stringify(body));
console.error('Cause: column "role" does not exist on users table.');
console.error('Resolution: Deploy Phase IE fix (replace SELECT role FROM users with permissionResolver.isAdminFromDatabase).');
pm.test('⛔ BLOCKED — Phase IE required (500 expected)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(500));

request.description:
⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE is deployed.

KNOWN ERROR: 500 — 'column "role" does not exist'

ROOT CAUSE: submitQuarterlyReport() in university-operations.service.ts (~line 3078) contains orphaned pre-RBAC raw SQL:
  SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = $1

The users table has no 'role' column. RBAC uses user_roles → roles tables.

FIX (Phase IE-3): Replace the 6-line adminCheck block with:
  const isAdmin = await this.permissionResolver.isAdminFromDatabase(userId);

This request and 08-F (approve) will remain blocked until that fix is deployed.

item.name: 08-F: Approve Quarterly Report (Admin) ⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE

exec: console.warn('⛔ PHASE IE REQUIRED: 08-E (Submit) must succeed first. Both are blocked by the same "role" column schema drift bug.');
console.error('❌ 500 (expected until Phase IE). Same root cause as 08-E: column "role" does not exist.');
pm.test('⛔ BLOCKED — Phase IE required (500 expected)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(500));

request.description:
⛔ BLOCKED until Phase IE is deployed.

Depends on 08-E (Submit) completing first — QR must be in PENDING_REVIEW to approve.

Same root cause as 08-E: column 'role' does not exist on users table.

Run after Phase IE-3 is deployed and 08-E succeeds.
Should contain SUBMITTED + APPROVED audit events from 08-E and 08-F.

item.name: 11 — REGRESSION: Physical Page Flow (IA-V12)
item.description: 6-step flow mimicking what the Physical Accomplishment page does on load. ALL 6 must return 200 OK to satisfy IA-V12.

item.name: 11-4: Get Indicators Data Rows (Physical page table)
11-6: List QR Status (Physical page report status)

exec: pm.test('[Physical Step 6/6] Status 200 — IA-V12 Physical PASS', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: 12 — REGRESSION: Financial Page Flow (IA-V12)
item.description: 6-step flow mimicking what the Financial Accomplishment page does on load. ALL 6 must return 200 OK to satisfy IA-V12.

item.name: 12-6: List QR Status (Financial page report status)

exec: pm.test('[Financial Step 6/6] Status 200 — IA-V12 Financial PASS', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

request.description: Optional cleanup. Soft-deletes the test operation created in 03-B.
